title: melissa officinalis subsp. inodora
intro: Melissa officinalis subsp. inodora, also known as the lemon balm plant, is a subspecies of the Melissa officinalis plant, a member of the mint family with a distinctive lemon scent. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, due to its content of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Melissa officinalis subsp. inodora include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in skincare products due to its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties.
